name: The Sanctuary Golf & Social Club
about: The Sanctuary Golf & Social Club is a private, year-round destination that combines indoor golf and pickleball with a social clubhouse experience. The venue features best-in-class Trackman simulator suites for golf, alongside a full bar and dining options. It offers a modern southern hospitality environment designed for both serious practice and casual play, with an emphasis on community and exclusivity without pretense. The facility is entirely indoors, ensuring play is possible in any weather, and caters to members looking for a comprehensive golf and social experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman technology for accurate ball and club tracking
Year-round indoor play不受天气影响
Combines serious practice with social dining and events
Private, exclusive environment without pretentious atmosphere

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen and dining options available for members
Full bar service with wine, cocktails, and other beverages

simulator_hardware.notes: Best-in-class Trackman suites for golf simulation

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Members can bring their own clubs, but rental clubs are likely available for practice and play.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full kitchen and bar, so outside food and drinks are likely not permitted, but dining options are available on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: With Trackman technology, 18 holes can typically be played in about 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is described as family-friendly with options for all ages, including pickleball and social events.
